stemHtml:
An aircraft is flying from A to B a distance of 60 NM. The True course in the flight log is 090°, the forecast wind is 225°T/15 kt and the TAS is 150 kt. After 15 minutes of flying with the planned TAS and TH the aircraft is 3 NM south of the intended track and 2.5 NM ahead of the dead reckoning position.

To reach destination B from this position, the correction angle on the heading should be…
